calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-19-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: David Davenport.
Appearances:
Lourdes Sainez, Plaintiff present with counsel, Brenda Keith.
Cesar Compos, Defendant present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises of the property located at: 1140 Potrero Ave., San Francisco. CA. Stayed of execution, if the defendant vacates the premises on or before July 1, 2003 at 11:00 AM. and return all keys to Plaintiff's counsel at 1965 Market St., 2nd Floor. SF. by 10 AM., the Defendant to be given a Cashier's check for $300.00, plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and to dismiss the action with prejudice. Securtiy deposit is forfeited. Each party waives claim against the other. Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees. Any items left in the premises will be disposed of. No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession. Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
